# Q 

2 

M 

TIRE EXPRESS

## Exterior / maintenance

### Quick and easy tyre dressing for everyday use.

Q²M Tire Express is an everyday tyre and rubber dressing designed to restore a clean and factory fresh appearance. It offers a simple application and delivers a natural, matte visual effect that lasts for hundreds of miles, even in wet conditions.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_tire-express_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## The quick and easy way to make your tyres look clean and fresh.

Q²M Tire Express simplifies tyre maintenance by providing fast application and consistent visual results. Its water based formula allows use on dry or wet tyres and creates a self cleaning layer that helps keep tyres looking clean.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons61.svg)

REPELS DIRT 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons18.svg)

FACTORY FRESH LOOK 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons10.svg)

DRY AND WET APPLICTION 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mtireexpress.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML

Real World Lifespan

>2 washes

Consumption

10-15ml/ set

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

TIRE EXPRESS

01
Apply Q²M Tire Express to clean tyres. 

02
Spread evenly using a tyre applicator or brush. 

03
Allow the product to level on the surface. 

04
Wipe off excess if needed. 

05
Let the tyre dry before driving. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Does Q²M Tire Express leave a glossy finish? 

No. It leaves a natural matte appearance.

02
Can it be applied on wet tyres? 

Yes. It can be applied on dry or wet rubber.

03
How long does the visual effect last? 

It lasts for multiple washes depending on conditions.

04
Is it easy to apply? 

Yes. It spreads easily with minimal effort.

05
Does it replace Q² Tire? 

No. It is an everyday dressing, while Q² Tire is a long term coating.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000250597-Q-M-Tire-Express)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
